title: A family observed two big round UFOs from a car near Curitiba-PR [1995]
excerpt: SEPT 9th, 1995. Time: 18h50. Duration: 3 to 4 minutes. Four people of the same family observed two unidentified flying objects from “a car on the BR277 road, in the coast-Curitiba direction, in the Guatupê region, close to the Police Academy.” According to the witnesses, the UFOs were round “with yellow lights around them and […]
text_preview: SEPT 9th, 1995. Time: 18h50. Duration: 3 to 4 minutes. Four people of the same family observed two unidentified flying objects from “a car on the BR277 road, in the coast-Curitiba direction, in the Guatupê region, close to the Police Academy.” According to the witnesses, the UFOs were round “with yellow lights around them and a strong reddish light centered at the bottom”. The unknown objects were “initially stopped [distant 5km from each other], then they turned off the lights, went upwards, came back and disappeared in the eastern direction”, coming from the West, at an altitude of about 2,0
summary: A family of four near Curitiba-PR observed two large round UFOs with yellow and red lights hover then shoot upward on BR-277 highway on Sept 9, 1995.
